overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing characters with neon-lit umbrellas walking through a futuristic city at night. The scene features wet reflective streets, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicles passing through neon-lit intersections.

person in green suit holding a glowing pink umbrella

bright neon signs advertising shops and businesses

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian arcade with neon-lit storefronts and wet reflective pavement. The camera follows pedestrians including a person in a plaid shirt and another with a glowing pink umbrella.

events.description: characters stop at the crosswalk to wait for traffic
large truck drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at street corner waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: large dark truck driving through the intersection
man in blue shirt with glowing pink neon umbrella

segments.scene_description: Characters wait at a street corner crosswalk as a large truck and other vehicles pass through the intersection. Two men stand with glowing neon umbrellas while the camera pans to show the traffic.

events.description: characters begin walking along the sidewalk away from the intersection
woman with red hair approaches and interacts with the main character

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a building with large pink-lit columns

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair stumbling or dodging near the main character

large floating advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk beside a building with prominent pink-lit columns. A woman with red hair approaches and interacts briefly with the main character before continuing on.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk with glowing green text markings

agents.ego_description: walking across a futuristic crosswalk with illuminated green text markings

entered.detail: crosswalk with illuminated green text embedded in the pavement
tall buildings with neon lighting in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street and steps onto a crosswalk featuring glowing green text markings. The surrounding area shows more of the futuristic cityscape with distant neon-lit towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district, transitioning from a sheltered pedestrian arcade into the open expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway with wet, reflective pavement, following pedestrians and a person carrying a glowing pink umbrella past vibrant storefronts. As the camera reaches a street corner, the scene opens up to a bustling intersection where the view pans across passing trucks and vehicles while characters wait with neon umbrellas. The movement then shifts along a sidewalk lined with prominent pink-lit columns, where a red-haired woman briefly interacts with the main character before moving away. Finally, the camera advances onto a crosswalk marked with glowing green text, revealing a wider vista of the cityscape and distant neon-lit towers.
